calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-17-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Trial de Novo Held, Wed., 17nOV04 WITH RESPONDENT IRINA lEINOVA appearing in Propria Persona and Appellant Globe Van Lines represented by Mr. Isaac Nagar, President of Globe Van Lines with Witness Mr. Asaf, Foreman of Globe Van Lines both appearing; the Clerk administers the oath to all parties and prospective witnesses. The Court hears all oral testimony presented by both parties and all witnesses and receives, reads, and reviews all documentary evidence presented this day; thereupon, the Court takes the matter under submission. JUDGE: Pro Tem Judge Jason Jungreis; CLERK: Marjorie L. Manzella; NOT REPORTED (Wed., 17Nov2004, D-525).
